sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28654" key="dusa/mbatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-άμβᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, poet. for <sense id="n28654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">δυσανάβατος, πέτραι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:58:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
